ec2.vpn.connection.CustomerGatewayId.Description: The ID of the customer gateway at your end of the VPN connection.

ec2.vpn.connection.StaticRoutesOnly.Description: Indicates whether the VPN connection uses static routes only. Static routes must be used for devices that don't support BGP.  If you are creating a VPN connection for a device that does not support Border Gateway Protocol (BGP), you must specify `true`.

ec2.vpn.connection.Tags.Description: Any tags assigned to the VPN connection.

ec2.vpn.connection.TransitGatewayId.Description: The ID of the transit gateway associated with the VPN connection.  You must specify either `TransitGatewayId` or `VpnGatewayId`, but not both.

ec2.vpn.connection.VpnGatewayId.Description: The ID of the virtual private gateway at the AWS side of the VPN connection.  You must specify either `TransitGatewayId` or `VpnGatewayId`, but not both.

ec2.vpn.connection.VpnTunnelOptionsSpeci.Description: The tunnel options for the VPN connection.
